about.headline: About Modernize Green Solutions
about.lead: Making energy-efficient homes affordable for every homeowner.
about.body:
Who we are

With a combined experience of over 30 years, we are proud to offer a complete array of services, including solar panels, HVAC systems, impact windows and doors, roofing, and landscaping. Our company prides itself on providing quality products and services that help you save money on your utility bills while making our planet a better place.

We offer both commercial and residential services with an emphasis on renewable energy solutions. Whether you need a new HVAC system or want to make some updates around your home, we’ve got you covered.

What we do

With our experienced construction team, we offer top-tier home renovation services tailored to your personal needs from start-to-finish while utilizing green energy.

Why Choose Us

Expedited time frames

Finance programs

Professional and certified

Clean and organized

MEET THE TEAM

luca Vard

Senior Executive

agnes southern

Head Marketing

adam smith

Project Manager

Discover How Our Renewable Energy Solutions Can Benefit You

Solar Panels

HVAC

Windows

Roofing

Landscaping

Explore Our Solutions

Renewable Energy

We Do It All

Explore Our Projects

Design

Build

Install

Sorry, your browser doesn't support embedded videos.

Community

Community is an employee-owned life insurance company with a deep commitment to service. We do things differently, and we make a difference.

Energy Platforms

If you’re looking for a green energy platform, we can help! We are experts in the field, with over ten years of experience and a proven track record of client satisfaction. Our goal is to provide high quality services at affordable prices so that anyone can get started with their own green energy platform.

Usage & Control

The benefits of using renewable energy are numerous. Renewable energy sources, including solar, wind and hydroelectric power, do not produce greenhouse gas emissions and can reduce some types of air pollution. They also diversify our energy supply and decrease dependence on imported fuels. This can help us avoid price spikes that occur when demand is high and supply is low—a problem that has plagued the U.S. in recent years.

Let us help you

solar-panels.body:
GO GREEN – 

SAVE ON YOUR BILLS!

Reliable Energy Supply

Install a solar energy system for your home. Whether you live in a sunny location or are just looking for a way to reduce your electricity costs, call us today and learn how solar energy can help save you money.

Energy Independence

Solar panels give you energy independence by allowing you to generate your own electricity. With solar panels, you can reduce or eliminate your reliance on external energy sources and take charge of your energy future!

Customizable Solutions

Solar panels are a great long-term investment for reducing your monthly utility bill while adding value to your home. Solar energy is clean and environmentally responsible and can be installed in various locations on your property.

BENEFITS OF SWITCHING TO A SOLAR PANEL SYSTEM:

Moving to a solar panel system offers many advantages, including financial savings, environmental benefits, energy independence, and long-term value. It’s an investment that benefits you and contributes to a sustainable future for generations to come.

Cost Savings

By generating your own electricity, you can reduce your reliance on grid power.

Renewable Energy

By adopting solar power, you contribute to reducing greenhouse gas emissions and combating climate change.

Energy Independence

With a solar panel system, you become more self-reliant regarding energy production.

Long-Term Investment

Installing solar panels is a long-term investment that can increase the value of your property.

Government Incentives

Governments offer incentives, such as tax credits, rebates, and net metering programs, to encourage the adoption of solar energy.

Technological Advancements

Solar panels are more efficient, sleeker, and customizable, allowing for seamless integration into various architectural styles.

hvac.body:
What we do

RENEWABLE ENERGY THAT CONTRIBUTES TO A CARBON-NEUTRAL ECONOMY

Zoning Systems

Programmable Thermostats

High Energy Efficiency

The best value for your money

AN ENERGY-EFFICIENT HVAC

Installation of a green HVAC system can provide energy-efficient and environmentally friendly heating, cooling, and ventilation solutions for your home. By embracing sustainable HVAC technologies, homeowners can enjoy enhanced comfort, improved indoor air quality, reduced environmental impact, and lower utility bills.

Get in touch

Zoning Systems

Air Filtration and Purification

Renewable Energy Integration

Energy Recovery Ventilation

THE BENEFIT OF A GREEN HVAC SYSTEM

Green HVAC systems utilize energy-saving, highly efficient components and technologies to reduce air conditioner energy consumption. Some energy-efficient HVAC systems can save homeowners up to 30% on annual cooling costs compared to conventional units, often cutting household cooling bills in half. Homes equipped with these types of HVAC systems can also enjoy reduced utility bills and indoor comfort levels that are more consistent throughout the seasons.

windows.body:
WE PROUDLY OFFER STRONGER, SAFER, ELEGANT, AND ENERGY-EFFICIENT WINDOWS

Locally Build

Our windows are both cost-effective and eco-friendly, as they are locally made and shipped by rail rather than truck.

Energy Efficiency

Our replacement windows are Energy Star rated and exceed the 2023 criteria. They are designed to increase your comfort and lower your utility bills while increasing curb appeal.

Expert Installation

Installing new windows should be easy and cost-effective. Our mission is to make replacing your windows as affordable as possible by offering a warranty and financing options.

INSPIRATION FOR REPLACEMENT WINDOWS

Reduced Energy Consumption

Energy-efficient windows can help reduce a home’s energy consumption and ultimately lower utility bills. Minimizing the need for heating and cooling, they also help reduce your carbon footprint.

Improved Thermal Comfort

Thermal window film can be applied to both the inside and outside of your windows to help improve energy efficiency, lower utility bills, and reduce seasonal temperature shifts.

UV Protection

Energy-efficient windows help protect indoor furnishings and fabrics from UV damage, preserving their appearance and extending lifespan. They also reduce one’s load on the power grid, which is good for the environment, too!

Noise Reduction

Our windows and doors provide better sound insulation, reducing the transmission of external noise into the interior of a building. This results in improved indoor comfort for occupants and increased productivity for buildings.

Condensation Reduction

Energy-efficient windows help maintain a healthier indoor environment by minimizing condensation. This helps eliminate the growth of mold, damage to window frames, as well as costly repairs.

Increased Property Value

You can increase the value of your home by installing energy-efficient windows. These upgrades will make it more appealing in the real estate market and help you save on your monthly utilities expenses.

Let’s get started

Request a detailed estimate

roofing.body:
A FEW REASONS WHY OUR ROOFING OPTIONS ARE RIGHT FOR YOU

Attic Ventilation

Attic ventilation is important to any home improvement or attic remodeling project. Without proper attention to ventilation in the attic, it will not only run hotter but also be prone to moisture, which can damage your roofing materials and cause mold growth.

Layered Roof Deck Protection

Your roof is your first defense in protecting your home against severe weather like wind-driven rain, hailstorms, ice dams and snow. Roof shingles are often the only waterproof barrier between your house and Mother Nature’s force.

Starter Strip and Ridge Cap Shingles

Improve the value of your home by installing starter strips and ridge cap shingles. Starter strip shingles save you time as well as money. Starter strips fit behind the foundation and into each gable end when layering roofing materials.

landscaping.body:
TRANSFORM YOUR OUTDOOR SPACE WITH SKILLED CONTRACTORS WHO OPTIMIZE EFFICIENCY WHILE BLENDING AESTHETICS.

Artificial turf

Artificial Turf is a great way to save time and money on yard maintenance. It can be installed in areas that are difficult or impossible to mow, such as those with steep slopes or narrow spaces. It’s also safe for pets and children to play on because it doesn’t harbor mold or other harmful organisms like natural grass does.

Pavers

Pavers are the best addition to your yard for a more professional appearance. They can be used in any part of your landscape design, including patios, driveways, pool patios, walkways and retaining walls.

Concrete

We provide our customers with quality concrete services that they can depend on. If you want the best quality of concrete services in Florida, give us the chance to provide you with your concrete service needs. With our talented team, you can receive any of the concrete services that you need.

REDUCE YOUR ENERGY COSTS WITH BEAUTIFUL, SUSTAINABLE LANDSCAPING

Money Saving

With the growing demand of gasoline and electricity prices, save hundreds of dollars by turning your yard into an energy-efficient landscape with us today.

ECO Friendly

Improve your home’s curb appeal and project professionalism with our energy-efficient landscaping. Our eco-conscious design approach offers attractive, long-lasting landscapes.

Beautiful Design

From rooftop gardens to solar water heaters and outdoor lighting, you can enhance your property with out beautiful yet practical designs.

Let’s get started

attic-insulation.body:
A FEW REASONS WHY OUR ATTIC INSULATION OPTIONS ARE RIGHT FOR YOU

Attic insulation

Attic insulation is your home’s first line of defense against extreme temperatures, helping to maintain indoor comfort and reduce energy costs year-round. By creating a thermal barrier, insulation protects your home from heat loss in the winter and heat gain in the summer, making your living space more energy-efficient and resilient against the elements.

Attic Ventilation

Attic ventilation is important to any home improvement or attic remodeling project. Without proper attention to ventilation in the attic, it will not only run hotter but also be prone to moisture, which can damage your roofing materials and cause mold growth.

posts.title: The Pros and Cons Of Renewable Energy
posts.excerpt: Nam magna ex, accumsan id auctor sed, finibus a urna. Proin interdum feugiat viverra. Praesent sapien tortor, pulvinar rutrum purus at, tincidunt pretium dolor.
posts.body:
Pros:

The pros of renewable energy can be summed up as follows:

Saves money. Renewable energy costs less than fossil fuels, so you’ll save money on your monthly electric bill. In fact, many people have found that installing solar panels or wind turbines in their homes has actually resulted in a net profit for them!

Reduces greenhouse gas emissions. Fossil fuels are the main cause of climate change, so reducing our dependence on them will help keep our planet healthy and livable for future generations (and yourself).

Helps the environment by reducing pollution from coal plants and oil refineries; planting trees instead of burning them; protecting wildlife habitats with wind farms and solar arrays; avoiding chemical spills during mining operations…the list goes on!

Cons:

Cost: Renewables are more expensive than fossil fuels to generate energy, but they’re still cheaper than nuclear power.

Space: Wind turbines and solar panels take up a lot of space, so it may not be possible for you to use renewable energy in your home if you live in an area with limited land space or restrictions on building height.

Time: It takes longer for renewables such as wind turbines and solar panels to produce electricity than fossil fuels do–they can’t provide instant power like coal plants do when coal is burned in them! Also, these technologies require maintenance (like cleaning) over time which adds costs to their production costs as well

Safety Concerns: Some people worry about safety issues related specifically to wind farms, such as birds being killed by blades spinning at high speeds; however, no deaths have been recorded yet since these farms started operating commercially back in the 1980s

Renewable energy is the future, but it’s not perfect.

Renewable energy, while not perfect, is the future. It has many benefits and only a few drawbacks.

Pros:

Renewable energy sources are abundant and can be found in nearly every part of the world.

These sources will never run out, unlike fossil fuels and nuclear power plants that have limited lifespans before they become obsolete or have to be decommissioned due to safety concerns.

Cons:

The cost of installing solar panels or wind turbines may seem high at first glance but when you consider how much money you’ll save on your utility bills each month, it’s clear that renewable energy investments are worth making!

Conclusion

Renewable energy is the future, but it’s not perfect. We need to continue to push for cleaner energy sources and work towards a world where fossil fuels are no longer used.
